home.title: Cassandra Chess Puzzles
home.subtitle: Train deeper pattern recognition with retrograde analysis and opponent prediction puzzles.
home.battles.title: Puzzle Battles
home.battles.desc: Challenge a friend to 5 puzzles — fastest correct solve wins each round.
home.brilliant.title: Brilliant Puzzle of the Day
home.brilliant.desc: Find the computer-class sacrifice. Rotates every 24 hours.
home.puzzles.retrograde.title: Retrograde Analysis
home.puzzles.retrograde.desc: Before solving, identify what move the opponent just played to reach the position. Builds board-reading intuition.
home.puzzles.prediction.title: Opponent Prediction
home.puzzles.prediction.desc: Predict your opponent's next move before it happens. Trains defensive awareness and tactical threat recognition.
home.puzzles.timed.title: Timed Solving
home.puzzles.timed.desc: Every puzzle is timed. See how your solve speed compares to other players and benchmark against your time control.
home.streaks.title: 🔥 Top Streaks

onboarding.connectAtLeastOne: Connect at least one account to continue.

landing.hero.title: Train smarter.
landing.hero.subtitle: Cassandra analyses your real games to find the positions where you keep going wrong — then drills you on exactly those moments until they stick.
landing.why.card1.title: Puzzles from your own games
landing.why.card1.desc: Connect Lichess or Chess.com. We find the blunders in your recent games and turn them into targeted puzzles — so you train on your actual weaknesses.
landing.why.card2.title: Unlimited puzzles, no paywall
landing.why.card2.desc: Every feature is free. No premium tier, no puzzle limits. Just train as much as you want, whenever you want.
landing.why.card3.title: Connects both platforms
landing.why.card3.desc: Link your Lichess and Chess.com accounts. Cassandra pulls games from both and merges your training into one place.
landing.how.step1.title: Connect your account
landing.how.step1.desc: Link Lichess, Chess.com, or both. Takes 30 seconds.
landing.how.step2.title: We analyse your games
landing.how.step2.desc: Stockfish scans your recent games and finds the moments you went wrong.
landing.how.step3.title: Train on your mistakes
landing.how.step3.desc: Solve puzzles pulled from your own blunders until the patterns stick.
landing.cta.title: Ready to stop making the same mistakes?
landing.footer.source: Puzzles from users' real games · and the Lichess open database (CC0)
connect.title: Connect your chess account
connect.subtitle: We'll analyse your games and build personalised puzzles.
connect.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
lang.label: Language
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.collect.country: Country and nationality flag — from Chess.com/Lichess profile or detected from IP via Vercel
privacy.collect.ratings: Player ratings (Elo) from Chess.com/Lichess at connection
privacy.collect.gameHistory: Chess game history from Chess.com and Lichess public APIs — moves, results, opponent usernames, dates, engine evaluations
privacy.collect.device: Device type, browser, OS, referring website (via Vercel Analytics)
privacy.collect.puzzleData: Puzzle attempt data: moves played, solve times, correct/incorrect results
privacy.collect.payment: Payment status via Stripe — we never see card details
privacy.dataNotice: We collect personal data linked to your chess account identity. This data is used exclusively to provide your personalised puzzle training experience. We do not sell your data to third parties. You can request complete deletion at any time.
privacy.thirdParty.ga4: Google Analytics GA4 — page views and behaviour tracking
privacy.thirdParty.gsc: Google Search Console — monitors how cassandrachess.com appears in Google search results. No personal user data is collected.
privacy.thirdParty.bing: Bing Webmaster Tools — monitors how cassandrachess.com appears in Bing search results. No personal user data is collected.
privacy.thirdParty.adsense: Google AdSense — advertising cookies for free users. Paid users are exempt.
privacy.thirdParty.metaPixel: Meta Pixel — ad performance tracking. We share hashed email and country with Meta for audience matching.
privacy.thirdParty.vercel: Vercel Analytics — performance, page views, device and country data
privacy.thirdParty.vercelFull: Vercel — hosts the application and provides analytics including page views, device type, browser, operating system, country, and referring website. This data is pseudonymous and not linked to individual user accounts. Vercel also processes inbound emails sent to josh@cassandrachess.com.
privacy.thirdParty.speedInsights: Vercel Speed Insights — collects Core Web Vitals and performance metrics including page load times, device type, and browser. This data is pseudonymous and not linked to individual user accounts.
privacy.thirdParty.supabase: Supabase — database hosted in United States
privacy.thirdParty.chesscom: Chess.com public API — game history, rating, nationality flag
privacy.thirdParty.lichess: Lichess public API — game history, rating, nationality flag
privacy.thirdParty.stockfish: Stockfish WASM — runs entirely in your browser, no data sent externally
privacy.rights: Request deletion by emailing josh@cassandrachess.com. Unsubscribe from emails anytime. EU/UK users have full GDPR rights.
privacy.cookiesDesc: Session (login), preference (language/banners), analytics (GA4/Vercel), advertising (AdSense/Meta Pixel — free users only).
privacy.declineTitle: What happens if you decline cookies
privacy.declineDesc: If you decline cookies: Google AdSense will not load and you will not see personalised ads. Meta Pixel will not load and your visit will not be tracked for advertising purposes. Google Analytics will run in anonymous mode only — no personal identifiers are collected. Session cookies required for login are always active regardless of your choice as they are essential for the service to function. You can change your cookie preferences at any time using the Cookie Preferences link in the footer.
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.service: Cassandra Chess provides free chess puzzle training, with an optional one-time payment to remove ads.
terms.accounts: You are responsible for your account. Usernames must be your own — entering another player's username to access their data is prohibited.
terms.dataConsent: We collect and process data as described in our Privacy Policy. By using Cassandra Chess you agree to this data collection.
terms.payments: One-time payment, no refunds on digital products.
terms.content: Puzzles are generated from users' real games and the Lichess open database (CC0).
terms.prohibited: Abuse, reverse engineering, and commercial use without permission are prohibited.
terms.liability: The service is provided as-is, without warranty of any kind.
terms.governingLaw: These terms are governed by the laws of England and Wales.
cookie.message: We use cookies for login, analytics (Google Analytics, Vercel), and advertising (Google AdSense). Paid users are exempt from advertising cookies.
changelog.message: 🆕 Cassandra Chess v1.2 — cookie controls, privacy policy, speed improvements, and more. Chess On! 🏆
landing.hero.sellingPoint: Tired of paying for game reviews? We analyse your games for free and turn your mistakes into puzzles.
invite.title: {name} invited you to Cassandra Chess
invite.sellingPoint: Tired of paying for game reviews? We analyse your games for free and turn your mistakes into puzzles.
invite.card1Desc: Connect Chess.com or Lichess. We find the blunders in your recent games and turn them into targeted puzzles.
invite.card2Desc: We run Stockfish on every game — the same analysis other platforms charge for. Completely free.
invite.card3Desc: Every feature is free. No premium tier, no puzzle limits. Just train as much as you want.
